title: Planet Hoppers
content:
{{Top|rwm}}
{{Quote|Welcome to 'Planet Hoppers,' a new feature on the ''Star Wars Roleplaying Game'' website. Each month, we'll bring you a set of articles on a particular world in the ''Star Wars'' galaxy that a Gamemaster can use separately or as a linked series of events.|Planet Hoppers introduction on Wizards.com|<ref name="Carida: Heavy Duty">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030904carida|text=Carida: Heavy Duty|int=Carida: Heavy Duty}}</ref>}}
'''Planet Hoppers''' was a web feature on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] [[Wizards.com|website]] published weekly (skipping a few weeks) from [[January]] [[2003]] to October [[2004]], with an additional chapter in April [[2005]] and a few more in [[2008]]. Each story is four to five chapters set on a single planet, along with [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game|roleplaying-game]] stats and info about the characters, technology, creatures, and locations in the story.

==Contents==
===Original series===
[[Morrie Mullins (real person)|Morrie Mullins]], then [[Cory J. Herndon]], wrote these articles, with the final chapter by [[Rodney Thompson]].

*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030102ralltiirintro|text=A Traveler's Journals of Ralltiir|int=A Traveler's Journals of Ralltiir}}, January 2003
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030206arkanianintro|text=Arkanian Chill|int=Arkanian Chill}}, February 2003
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030306velmor|text=Velmor: Royalty and Rebellion|int=Velmor: Royalty and Rebellion}}, March 2003
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030403coruscant|text=Coruscant: Center of the Empire|int=Coruscant: Center of the Empire}}, April 2003
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030501kessel|text=Kessel: Hell in Space|int=Kessel: Hell in Space}}, May 2003
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030605arbra|text=Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm|int=Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm}}, June 2003
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030703ando|text=Ando: Planet of the Walrus Men|int=Ando: Planet of the Walrus Men}}, July 2003
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030807aargau|text=Aargau: For All Your Banking Needs|int=Aargau: For All Your Banking Needs}}, August 2003
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030904carida|text=Carida: Heavy Duty|int=Carida: Heavy Duty}}, September 2003
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031002korriban|text=Korriban: Planet of Lost Souls|int=Korriban: Planet of Lost Souls}}, October 2003
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031106thyferra|text=Thyferra: Bacta Basics|int=Thyferra: Bacta Basics}}, November 2003
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031204hoth|text=Hoth: Under the Ice|int=Hoth: Under the Ice}}, December 2003
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040105zeltros|text=Zeltros: Pleasure Planet|int=Zeltros: Pleasure Planet}}, January 2004
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040205manaan|text=Manaan: Depths of History|int=Manaan: Depths of History}}, February 2004
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040304vandelhelm|text=Vandelhelm: Enemies and Alloys|int=Vandelhelm: Enemies and Alloys}}, March 2004
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040401adumarmain|text=Adumar: Pilots Wanted|int=Adumar: Pilots Wanted}}, April 2004
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040506hapesmain|text=Hapes: Ladies First|int=Hapes: Ladies First}}, May 2004
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040603behebothmain|text=Beheboth: Blood and Water|int=Beheboth: Blood and Water}}, June 2004
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040722yavin|text=Yavin: The Big Red One|int=Yavin: The Big Red One}}, July–August 2004
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040930bespinmain|text=Bespin: Action Tidings|int=Bespin: Action Tidings}}, September–October 2004
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050414planetintro|text=Byss and the Deep Core|int=Byss and the Deep Core}}, April 2005. This article has a different format, containing only information, no story.

===For the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook|Saga Edition]]===
Written by [[Eric Cagle]], these articles shared the shortened format of the previous entry.

*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/PHCona|text=Planet Hoppers: Cona|int=Planet Hoppers: Cona}}, September 2008
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/PHPhindar|text=Planet Hoppers: Phindar|int=Planet Hoppers: Phindar}}, October 2008
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/PHCathar|text=Planet Hoppers: Cathar|int=Planet Hoppers: Cathar}}, November 2008
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/PHSkako|text=Planet Hoppers: Skako|int=Planet Hoppers: Skako}}, December 2008

A set of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] articles were planned but never published.
